testcase.name: test_validation_internal_step_auto_variable_refs_reports_missing_and_step_hold[Missing.Reset-no sequence step named 'Missing' exists in this module]
test_validation_internal_step_auto_variable_refs_reports_missing_and_step_hold[Start.Hold-step 'Start' only exposes .Hold when its sequence enables SeqControl]
